chat.headerSub: On-call coach · replies as soon as available · not for emergencies

chat.crisisNote: In an emergency, always call 911 or 988.

coaching.cardTitle: Private Zoom session with a coach
coaching.cardBody: A full hour, one-on-one — your situation, your questions, a concrete plan. $150/hour.
coaching.title: Book 1:1 coaching
coaching.subtitle: {{rate}}/hour · private Zoom session
coaching.description: Tell us when you are available and what you want to work on. We will reach out to confirm a time and arrange payment — your private Zoom link will appear here once confirmed.
coaching.confirmNote: We'll confirm the exact time by email or phone.
coaching.contactLabel: Best way to reach you (email or phone)
coaching.noteLabel: What would you like to focus on? (optional)
coaching.notePlaceholder: Boundaries with my son, preparing for an intervention...
coaching.paymentNote: $150/hour. We will confirm your time and send payment details by message within one business day.
coaching.submitted: ✓ Request received — we will be in touch to confirm your time and arrange payment.
